```csharp
/// <summary>
/// Maps a caught <paramref name="ex"/> to a <c>400 Bad Request</c> carrying
/// its <see cref="Exception.Message"/> when it is one of the well-known file
/// system faults (<see cref="ArgumentException"/>,
/// <see cref="UnauthorizedAccessException"/>,
/// <see cref="DirectoryNotFoundException"/>, <see cref="FileNotFoundException"/>
/// or <see cref="IOException"/>, matched in that order to preserve the
/// original catch precedence); returns <c>null</c> for any other type so the
/// caller can rethrow and let it propagate.
/// </summary>
private static ActionResult? TranslateKnownException(Exception ex)
{
    if (ex is ArgumentException
        || ex is UnauthorizedAccessException
        || ex is DirectoryNotFoundException
        || ex is FileNotFoundException
        || ex is IOException)
    {
        return new BadRequestObjectResult(new { error = ex.Message });
    }

    return null;
}
```
